description: Architected a scalable GraphRAG-based AI agent to automate codebase understanding across 6 languages. Engineered a prompt-driven graph retrieval pipeline and optimized memory management with a plan-and-act algorithm.
details: Rebuilt agent for company-wide codebase understanding and generation. Enhanced explainability by controlling memory on Cypher generation & tracking task/context with plan-and-act algorithm. Conducted performance evaluations to drive system design decisions.

description: Conducted empirical experiments on federated hyperparameter learning algorithms, specifically addressing challenges with heterogeneous datasets and data sparsity.
details: Built data processing and evaluation pipelines using Scikit-Learn, Pandas, and NumPy to benchmark algorithm performance on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Validated algorithmic robustness through rigorous statistical analysis.

description: Directed the architectural shift toward a real-time voice assistant app. Engineered a serverless RAG pipeline utilizing AWS Lambda and Pinecone vector database for automated daily data ingestion.
details: Mentored beginner developers in Agile/Scrum methodologies. Built a personalized, multi-source news insights application, setting up scalable embedding retrieval to position the app for launch.

description: Designed and deployed an end-to-end ML data annotation platform on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) in 12 days. Automated Python ETL workflows to securely process ECG data, increasing doctor efficiency by 70%.
details: Saved 3+ hours of weekly manual file management tasks. Implemented secure backend architecture with SHA-256 data hashing and optimized system usability through rapid, user-feedback-driven agile iterations.
